title: carex coriophora
intro: Carex coriophora, also known as the Rough Sedge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Carex coriophora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Carex coriophora is often dried and used in infusions or combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used to address various health concerns.
